✅ Verify Signed Artifact Bundle

Upload a signed artifact bundle (ZIP file) created by the Sign Existing Artifact feature in your local Continuum installation — the desktop package running on your own machine, not from this website.

This ZIP has a specific structure: the artifact itself, manifest.json, signers.json, and any included proofs (PGP, Bitcoin, Nostr, SSH).

All information in the ZIP except for the artifact itself is public; no private keys are required or transmitted to verify the signatures or proofs.

The browser verifier parses and checks the ZIP entirely locally within your browser: it verifies the artifact hash, all signatures, and the integrity of the included attestations.

No uploaded files are stored on this server

If you are concerned about sensitive content, it is recommended to use this verification tool within your local Continuum instance.

All verification libraries are bundled locally with Continuum, allowing this verification page to function fully offline without relying on external CDNs or third-party services.


Choose the ZIP produced by the Sign Existing Artifact flow.

Built on Nostr. Designed for durable authorship.
